_meta.description: Byte-exact golden vectors captured from the authoritative TypeScript chain layer for the C port to pin against.

ricardianCharter.ts_call: parseCharterParams / canonicalJSON / canonicalContractBytes / computeRicardianHash / signCharter / verifyCharterSignature (src/ricardianCharter.ts)

intEncoders.ts_call: num2bin (scryptlib, sized) and int2ByteString (scrypt-ts, one-arg minimal + sized)

rabinSpike_signByte.ts_call: int2ByteString(rabinPubKey) — sign-byte / minimal LE of the Rabin modulus n

commitLimit_live_shape.note: salt is random (248-bit); value not golden, structure is commitment=Mimc7.hash(limit,salt)

arpAttest.note: ArpAttest is a SmartContractLib (no lockingScript). Captured the static attestationMsg byte string.
